title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 20 lines).
summary_text: 1. High: `timeout` is now a hard runtime dependency in [canon-build-codex.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-codex.sh#L33), [canon-build-mini.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh#L76), and [canon-build-review.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-review.sh#L53). On this Darwin machine, `command -v timeout` returns nothing, so these wrappers will fail on first execution path that hits those lines. 2. Medium: [canon-build-mini.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh#L42) only validates `$LOCAL_CODEX` when the mini is offline at startup. If the mini disconnects later, [canon-build-mini.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh#L61) flips `USE_MINI=false` and then unconditionally executes the local binary at [canon-build-mini.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh#L76), turning a transient remote outage into a hard local failure. 3. Low: [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/note-generate/scripts/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L318) claims sub-200KB outputs get “one extra retry”, but the loop keeps retrying through the remaining attempts and even the legacy model before accepting the saved buffer at [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/note-generate/scripts/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L333). That is a cost/latency regression and does not match the documented behavior. No concrete security issue stood out in the reviewed executable changes. `bash -n` and `node --check` passed on the touched scripts.
